_comment: Mixed-capability catalog used by 'multi_candidate' tag fixtures. Contains 6 actions spanning two entities (purchase_request + leave_request — leave_request is synthetic, not in cap-demo). Pairs of similar verbs (submit_*, approve_*) deliberately set up ambiguity so fixtures can verify the resolver surfaces alternatives when confidence is below 0.7.

actions.name: submit_purchase_request
actions.label: Submit purchase request
actions.description: Submit a draft purchase request for approval

actions.name: submit_leave_request
actions.label: Submit leave request
actions.description: Submit a draft leave (vacation/PTO) request for approval

actions.name: reject_purchase_request
actions.label: Reject purchase request
actions.description: Reject a pending purchase request with a reason

actions.name: reject_leave_request
actions.label: Reject leave request
actions.description: Reject a pending leave request with a reason
